DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: MetaMesh workspace. Defaults to the current directory.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Read executable arguments from standard input.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Executable or script command to run.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Exit code that marks the step as successful. Defaults to 0.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Working directory, absolute or relative to the mesh root.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: MetaMesh workspace. Defaults to the current directory.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Model name hosted by the workspace.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Workspace path, absolute or relative to the mesh root.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: MetaMesh workspace. Defaults to the current directory.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: MetaMesh workspace. Defaults to the current directory.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Root path used to resolve relative workspace paths.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: MetaMesh workspace. Defaults to the current directory.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: MetaMesh workspace. Defaults to the current directory.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: MetaMesh workspace. Defaults to the current directory.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Show workspace paths and step commands.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: MetaMesh workspace. Defaults to the current directory.

DocumentationFact.Value: MetaMesh workspace. Defaults to the current directory.
